books.title: Words of Radiance
books.author: Brandon Sanderson
books.description: The second volume in the Stormlight Archive series follows Kaladin and Shallan as the Everstorm approaches.

books.title: The Way of Kings
books.author: Brandon Sanderson
books.description: Epic fantasy opener following Kaladin, Shallan, and Dalinar on the storm-swept world of Roshar.

books.title: The Eye of the World
books.author: Robert Jordan
books.description: The first book of the Wheel of Time — a young farmboy discovers he may be destined to save or destroy the world.

books.title: Outlander
books.author: Diana Gabaldon
books.description: A WWII combat nurse is swept back to 18th-century Scotland in this sweeping historical romance.

books.title: Killing Floor
books.author: Lee Child
books.description: The first Jack Reacher novel — ex-military cop wanders into a small Georgia town and stumbles into a murder.

books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: A lone astronaut wakes up millions of miles from Earth with no memory — and the fate of humanity on his shoulders.

books.title: A Game of Thrones
books.author: George R. R. Martin
books.description: Noble families vie for control of the Iron Throne in a world where seasons last years and ancient enemies stir in the frozen north.

books.title: The Name of the Wind
books.author: Patrick Rothfuss
books.description: A legendary wizard recounts his extraordinary life, from humble beginnings to the arcane university where he honed his gifts.

books.title: The Blade Itself
books.author: Joe Abercrombie
books.description: A reluctant hero, a torturer, and a barbarian warrior are drawn into a grand quest with no clean endings in this grimdark opener.

books.title: The Final Empire
books.author: Brandon Sanderson
books.description: In a world ruled by an immortal tyrant where ash falls from the sky, a young street thief joins a crew of rebels with magical powers.
